review.rejectionSummary: No candidate satisfies WP18 Outcome B requirements. No candidate is selected for future implementation.
evidenceGaps: Exact request bytes, report ID, or request length are missing.
Outcome B requires risk score 1 or 2.
Outcome B requires reversibility score 4 or 5.
Outcome B requires visual-only-low-risk or single-setting-low-risk classification.
Outcome B requires visual-only or single-setting mutation scope.
Backup evidence is missing or incomplete.
Rollback evidence is missing or incomplete.
Read-back or physical verification evidence is missing or incomplete.
Candidate category is not appropriate for a first write.
review.riskRationale: Current WP17 candidates are incomplete, too risky, or not first-write appropriate.
backupRollbackGaps: visual-lighting-first-write-placeholder: Missing; required before future review.
blocked-keymap-first-write: Rejected; no WP17 backup path.
blocked-keymap-first-write: Rejected; no WP17 rollback path.
readBackPhysicalVerificationGaps: visual-lighting-first-write-placeholder: Missing; required before future review.
blocked-keymap-first-write: Rejected; no WP17 read-back support.
futureEvidenceRequirements: Exact request bytes, report ID, and request length.
Clear target device and exact selected path/interface constraints.
Documented low-risk visual-only or single-setting mutation scope.
Local pre-write backup evidence and limitations.
Rollback/recovery evidence that does not depend on unknown writes.
Read-back or physical verification evidence with limitations.
Separate future work package and Red Team plan before any implementation.

records.title: Possible future visual-only lighting setting
records.gplSourceCleanlinessStatement: No GPL-3.0 source code, comments, constants, packet builders, structures, or implementation material copied.
records.targetInterfaceMetadata: Must be documented before future review.
records.officialAppUserActionContext: Future evidence must document exact action and avoid save/apply/sync ambiguity.
records.observedTimingContext: Unknown; must document previous, candidate, follow-up, and acknowledgement traffic.
records.riskScoreExplanation: Evidence is incomplete; risk is treated as unacceptable for first write.
records.physicalVerificationEvidenceSummary: Visual verification may be possible but is not documented.
records.unknownsAndUncertainties: Exact bytes, report ID, length, response, rollback, backup, and verification are unknown.
records.rejectionRationale: Exact request bytes, report ID, or request length are missing. Outcome B requires risk score 1 or 2. Outcome B requires reversibility score 4 or 5. Outcome B requires visual-only-low-risk or single-setting-low-risk classification. Outcome B requires visual-only or single-setting mutation scope. Backup evidence is missing or incomplete. Rollback evidence is missing or incomplete. Read-back or physical verification evidence is missing or incomplete. WP17 candidate status is not ready-for-future-Red-Team-review.
futureImplementationConstraints: Separate future work package required before implementation.
Separate Red Team plan and PASS required before closeout/tag.
No retries, polling, automatic execution, hidden follow-up commands, arbitrary payloads, raw command console, packet editor, or command registry execution.
records.futureRedTeamReviewRequirements: Complete evidence, rollback, backup, verification, and source-cleanliness review.
records.explicitNonExecutionStatement: WP18 candidate selection is not execution approval and does not implement, enable, or execute a write path.
errors: Exact request bytes, report ID, or request length are missing.

safetyNotes: WP18 does not implement, approve, enable, or execute any write command.
Candidate readiness and evidence completeness do not enable execution.
Backup, rollback, read-back, and physical verification evidence remain planning data only.
The future write gate remains disabled and requires a separate work package and Red Team plan.
The WP13/WP16 read-only command boundary remains unchanged.
